title: Positive flow: Navigating through settings options
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Easy Attendance Settings' screen. | Click on the 'Edit Classes' option. | Click on the 'Delete Classes' option. | Click on the 'Upgrade to PRO version' option. | Click on the 'Easy Attendance Help' option. | Click on the 'About Easy Attendance' option. | Click on the 'Rate Us' option.
expected_result: The app navigates to the 'Edit Classes' screen. | The app navigates to the 'Delete Classes' screen. | The app navigates to the 'Upgrade to PRO version' screen. | The app navigates to the 'Easy Attendance Help' screen. | The app navigates to the 'About Easy Attendance' screen. | The app navigates to the 'Rate Us' screen.
